instruction: Help me organize the cost data into the summary document

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Cost Item'
ws['B1'] = 'Budget(10K CNY)'
ws['C1'] = 'Actual(10K CNY)'
ws['D1'] = 'Variance(10K CNY)'
ws['A2'] = 'Raw Materials'
ws['B2'] = 3200
ws['C2'] = 3050
ws['D2'] = -150
ws['A3'] = 'Labor'
ws['B3'] = 1800
ws['C3'] = 1920
ws['D3'] = 120
ws['A4'] = 'Manufacturing Overhead'
ws['B4'] = 600
ws['C4'] = 580
ws['D4'] = -20
ws['A5'] = 'Period Expenses'
ws['B5'] = 800
ws['C5'] = 850
ws['D5'] = 50
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/cost_breakdown.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the cost data into the summary document
Calculate the total actual cost (3050+1920+580+850) from /home/user/Desktop/cost_breakdown.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/cost_summary.txt: 'Total Actual Cost: 64M CNY', save
